reviews.comment:
Atienden bien y rapido. La apo funciona ok y es muy practica.  Lo malo es que a veces se firma mucha fila y no habilitan mas surtidores.

(Translated by Google)
The service is good and fast. The payment system works well and is very convenient. The downside is that sometimes there's a long line and they don't open more pumps.
